conversations.content: How much did I spend on shopping today?

<function_thought>
To determine how much Emma Johnson spent on shopping today, I will first find out the current day and then look at her order history to calculate the total expenditure for that day. The first step is to get the current day.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_current_day()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The current day is retrieved as May 19, 2024. The next step is to view the order history to check if there were any purchases made on this date. This will allow us to calculate the total amount spent on shopping today.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

{'Order 1': {'order_id': 'ORDER-104674', 'product_name': 'Adidas Mens Z.n.e. T-Shirt', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-04-18', 'delivery_date': '2024-04-20', 'product_id': 'P030'}, 'Order 2': {'order_id': 'ORDER-107495', 'product_name': 'TechBrand Precision Wireless Mouse', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-05-06', 'delivery_date': '2024-05-10', 'product_id': 'P045'}, 'Order 3': {'order_id': 'ORDER-112543', 'product_name': 'Portable SSD 1TB', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-05-19', 'delivery_date': '2024-05-19', 'product_id': 'P009'}, 'Order 4': {'order_id': 'ORDER-113219', 'product_name': 'SpeedStep Running Shoes', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-05-19', 'delivery_date': None, 'product_id': 'P023'}}

<function_thought>
The order history reveals that there are two purchases made on May 19, 2024:
1. Portable SSD 1TB (Order ID: ORDER-112543)
2. SpeedStep Running Shoes (Order ID: ORDER-113219)

However, the pricing information for these purchases is missing. I need to retrieve the invoice details for both orders to calculate the total spent today.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_invoice(order_id="ORDER-112543"), get_invoice(order_id="ORDER-113219")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
The invoice has been sent to your email inbox.
The invoice has been sent to your email inbox.

The IDs for the attachments are '12' and '13' for the two invoices.
